headline: Deutsche Bank Raises Coca-Cola (KO) Target, Flags CPG Pressures and Demand Risks
summary: The Coca-Cola Company (NYSE:KO) is included among the 15 Best Consistent Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 30, Deutsche Bank raised its price recommendation on The Coca-Cola Company (NYSE:KO) to $86 from $83. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The firm said it sees “legitimate and widespread pressures building” across much of […]

headline: Is It Time To Reassess Coca-Cola (KO) At US$77 After Its Recent Share Price Strength
summary: Whether you are wondering if Coca-Cola at around US$77.22 a share is still a solid deal or starting to look expensive, this breakdown will help you frame what that price might actually represent. The stock has returned 1.2% over the last 7 days, 0.2% over the last 30 days, 11.7% year to date and 16.2% over the past year. This raises fair questions about whether recent performance is already reflected in the price. Recent coverage has continued to focus on Coca-Cola as a major global...
